title: False-Easy Target Choice
intendedTensionBeat: A visually open high target tempts the player after the L10 exam.
intendedReleaseBeat: Recognizing the buried lower target's priority feels like improved judgment.
expectedPath: Route into the lower or more urgent puppy first, then finish the visually open target.
expectedFailMode: Player commits too long to the open target and loses tempo on the lower target.
designNotes: This is recovery/choice, not punishment. Give enough margin to understand the mistake.
